home.tagline: Real Trips. Real Places. No Shortcuts.
home.subhead: Curated travel to Costa Rica's Caribbean coast and beyond — expertly guided, community-rooted, and designed for people who want to experience a place rather than just visit it.

about.title: Who We Are
about.content:
Ferguson Travel Co. was founded on a single conviction: that the best travel experiences come from deep local knowledge, genuine community relationships, and the willingness to go where the road gets quiet.

It started with Manzanillo — a village at the end of a road on Costa Rica's southern Caribbean coast, tucked against a wildlife refuge where the jungle meets the sea. A place discovered on a solo journey, and never quite left behind. What began as a personal obsession became a travel company built around one question: how do you design a trip that changes someone, without taking anything from the place?

We specialize in the Caribbean coast of Costa Rica and Panama — a region that combines reef, rainforest, indigenous culture, and Afro-Caribbean heritage in a way found nowhere else in the Americas. Our guides grew up here. Our lodges are locally owned. Our cultural experiences are designed with and for the communities that offer them.

Every package we sell is one we've done ourselves, vetted ourselves, and would send our closest friends on. We don't list anything we haven't personally walked, paddled, or eaten our way through.

We believe sustainable travel means more than carbon offsets — it means the people who live where you're visiting are genuinely better off because you came. We pay guides above market rates. We stay in locally owned accommodation. We contribute a portion of every cultural package directly to the communities involved.

We can't wait to help you plan something worth remembering.

pricing.title: Our Packages
pricing.content:
Every package we offer is all-inclusive in the things that matter: accommodation, guides, experiences, and transport. We don't believe in hidden fees or surprise add-ons.

All prices are per person, based on double occupancy unless otherwise stated. Single supplements are available on request. Flights are not included — we'll give you arrival airport recommendations and transfer arrangements for each destination.

We operate a transparent pricing model. Where packages involve indigenous or community-led experiences, a percentage (clearly stated in the package) goes directly to the hosting community — not as a donation, but as a fee for their time, expertise, and hospitality.

Deposits are 25% of the total package price, due at booking. The remaining balance is due 60 days before departure. All payments are processed via Stripe. Cancellations more than 60 days before departure receive a full refund minus the deposit. Cancellations within 60 days are non-refundable but can be transferred to another departure date.

If you have questions about any package, pricing, or what to expect on the ground, email us. We'll answer every question personally.
